prompt: Photorealistic studio portrait of a 28-year-old man, Southern French Mediterranean, dark tousled hair, short stubble. Working as Agent Réseaux Sociaux in a modern Paris office. Warm natural window light (soft overhead key + gentle fill), soft beige #ede3d2 backdrop, shallow depth of field, 85mm f/1.8, skin texture preserved (pores, fine lines, natural freckles if appropriate). Editorial magazine quality. No text, no logos, no watermarks. Vertical 9:16 composition, subject centered, upper-body framing.
